name: SCC_CertificateInstallationRes
title: SCC_CertificateInstallationRes
syntax: void SCC_CertificateInstallationRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode, char ContractID[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Certificate Installation Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this response can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
